title: Reuse base image layer in skopeo copy to oci:
body:
i want save image online and copy them to offline ,so what i do:

```
skopeo copy docker://nginx:latest oci:nginx
skopeo copy docker://nginx:latest oci:nginx1
```

is it possible let it just use 55M disk space
```
root@VM-20-2-ubuntu:~/skopeo# du -sh .
109M    .
root@VM-20-2-ubuntu:~/skopeo# du -sh *
55M     nginx
55M     nginx1
```

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

For the OCI layouts, see `--…shared-blob-dir` parameters.
